title: Longmont Public Library Offers Teen Temporary Tattoo Studio
guardrail_override_reason: Editor reviewed pre-publication warnings and chose to publish.
content:
The Longmont Public Library is hosting a Teen Temporary Tattoo Studio on Wednesday, July 1 from 5-6 pm, providing teens with an opportunity to get temporary tattoos.

This event is part of the library's ongoing efforts to engage local youth and offer creative activities. The session will take place

title: Vision Zero Projects Continue to Improve Transportation Safety in Longmont
